$comment: c17 (D-PP-CONDITIONAL-INCLUDE-ORDERING) runtime witness: the preprocessor FULLY skips a dead #if branch BEFORE the include splice + the global tokenize. The dead `#if 0` block holds lexically illegal chars ($ @ `) AND a quote-#include of a nonexistent header; a `#ifdef SQLITE_OS_WIN` (undefined on linux/macos) guards another missing include -- both must be elided (P0016 + P000E). The live arms set BASE=40, MARGIN=2; add(40,2)=42 -> exit 42. RED-ON-DISABLE: a regressed elision leaves `return 99` live (exit 99), or fails the build with a missing-include (P_PreprocessorIncludeError) or an illegal-char (P_IllegalChar) error. BASE/MARGIN reach add() as function args so the baseline arm keeps a live runtime add (not const-folded), and the optimizedPipelines `release` arm runs the shipped pipeline over the same source.
